sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ναθάν

- Transliteration: Nathan

- Phonetic: nath-an'

- Definition: Nathan = "a giver"

1. one of the four sons of David who were born to him by Bathshua

- Origin: of hebrew origin H5416

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H5416]; Nathan an Israelite: - Nathan.
